meaning: adj.背信弃义的,不忠的,不老实的,无信的,不忠实的
examples: She decided to divorce her increasingly faithless and unreliable husband.
So receive me brother with your faithless kiss.
If you don't keep promise, you are a faithless person.
Another of the bands taking part is Faithless and one member, Jamie Catto, told the BBC why he wanted to get involved.
Up to 35, 000 revellers attended the festival on each day last year, when the likes of Travis, REM, Roxy Music, Razorlight and Faithless were on the bill.
